tier_descriptions.1: Authoritative / Primary. Federal guidance, DHS/CISA, FEMA, FBI/ATF/USSS (DOJ/DHS), National Labs, ISC guides, NFPA guidance, .gov/.mil. Can set doctrine and baseline expectations.
tier_descriptions.2: Credible / Secondary. Industry associations (ASIS), UL research, academic/sector best practice. Can support OFCs; cannot override Tier 1.
tier_descriptions.3: Contextual / Observational. Trade, vendor-neutral white papers, case studies. Insight only; must be anchored to Tier 1 or 2.

scope_tags_note: Scope tags may only consist of values from reference data: discipline codes, subtype codes, module codes (MODULE_*), sector id/name, or subsector id/name. Enforced at source-registry API and display.
notes: This policy is used for classification only. Enforcement happens at API boundaries during OFC creation/promotion.
